title: Companions of the Night
writer: Paul Andréota, Jacques Companéez, Jacques Constant
actors: Françoise Arnoul, Raymond Pellegrin, Nicole Maurey
plot: Three events that seemingly nothing related, namely the murder of a truck driver, the discovery of the corpse of a vitriolic young woman, and the death of another who was crushed, will launch the Inspector Maréchal on the trail of...
